类 JavaClassUtil

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.utils.JavaClassUtil
public class JavaClassUtil extends Object
Handle JavaClass

  • 方法详细资料

    • getFields

      public static List<DocJavaField> getFields(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls1, int counter, Map<String, DocJavaField> addedFields, ClassLoader classLoader)
      Get fields
      参数:
      cls1 - The JavaClass object
      counter - Recursive counter
      addedFields - added fields,Field deduplication
      classLoader - classLoader
      返回:
      list of JavaField

    • getSameSignatureMethodCommonFromInterface

      public static String getSameSignatureMethodCommonFromInterface(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method)
      Get Common for methods with the same signature from interfaces
      参数:
      cls - cls
      method - method
      返回:
      common

    • getEnumValue

      public static Object getEnumValue(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, boolean jsonEnum)
      Get the value of an enum

      This method retrieves the value of an enum based on its fields or methods. It supports loading the enum class via reflection and determines the enum value based on the presence of specific annotations such as JsonValue

      参数:
      javaClass - The JavaClass object representing the enum class
      builder - A ProjectDocConfigBuilder object used to retrieve API configuration and the class loader
      jsonEnum - Enum is json or not
      返回:
      Object The enum value, whose type depends on the specific enum definition
      抛出:
      RuntimeException - If the enum constants do not exist

    • getDefaultEnumValue

      public static Object getDefaultEnumValue(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaField enumConstant)
      Get the value of an enumConstant

      First look for it using the @JsonValue annotation, and if you can't find it, look for the default value of the enumeration field

      参数:
      javaClass - The JavaClass object representing the enum class
      builder - A ProjectDocConfigBuilder object used to retrieve API configuration and the class loader
      enumConstant - The JavaField object representing the enum constant
      返回:
      Object The enum value, whose type depends on the specific enum definition
      抛出:
      RuntimeException - If the enum constants do not exist

    • getEnumValueWithJsonValue

      public static Object getEnumValueWithJsonValue(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaField enumConstant)
      Get the value with @JsonValue annotation

      This method retrieves the value of an enum based on its fields or methods. It supports loading the enum class via reflection and determines the enum value based on the presence of specific annotations such as JsonValue

      参数:
      javaClass - The JavaClass object representing the enum class
      builder - A ProjectDocConfigBuilder object used to retrieve API configuration and the class loader
      enumConstant - The JavaField object representing the enum constant
      返回:
      Object The enum value, whose type depends on the specific enum definition
      抛出:
      RuntimeException - If the enum constants do not exist

    • getEnumParams

      public static String getEnumParams(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass)
      Gets the enum parameters for the given JavaClass.
      参数:
      javaClass - The JavaClass representing the enum
      返回:
      A String containing the enum parameters

    • getEnumValues

      public static List<String> getEnumValues(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass)
      Gets the list of enum values for the given JavaClass.
      参数:
      javaClass - The JavaClass representing the enum
      返回:
      A List of Strings containing the enum values

    • getSeeEnum

      public static com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass getSeeEnum(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaField javaField, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder)
      Retrieves the associated enum class for a given Java field.

      This method aims to obtain the enum type (JavaClass) associated with the provided Java field object (JavaField). If the field does not associate with an enum type or if there is no appropriate @see tag providing enum information, it returns null. The splitting logic is implemented to handle the case where the @see tag might contain additional description information after the class name (e.g., `@see GenderEnum descriptionGender`).

      参数:
      javaField - The Java field object to inspect
      builder - The builder used to retrieve project documentation configuration
      返回:
      The enum class object associated with the field, or null if not found

    • getEnumInfo

      public static EnumInfo getEnumInfo(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder)
      get enum info by java class
      参数:
      javaClass - the java class info
      builder - builder
      返回:
      EnumInfo
      从以下版本开始:
      1.0.0

      返回:
      JavaClass

    • getActualTypesMap

      public static Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> getActualTypesMap(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass)
      get Actual type map
      参数:
      javaClass - JavaClass
      返回:
      Map

    • getParamGroupJavaClass

      public static Set<String> getParamGroupJavaClass(List<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation> annotations, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder builder)
      Obtain the validation group classes from controller method parameter annotations.

      This method processes a list of annotations associated with a controller method parameter to identify validation groups. It checks if any of the annotations are validation-related and retrieves their group classes. If the @Validated annotation is present and no group classes are specified, the default group class is added. The @Valid annotation is treated as equivalent to the default group since it does not have group parameters.

      参数:
      annotations - the list of annotations on the controller method parameter.
      builder - the JavaProjectBuilder instance used to resolve annotation values.
      返回:
      a set of group class names identified from the annotations, or an empty set if none are found.

    • getParamGroupJavaClass

      public static Set<String> getParamGroupJavaClass(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation javaAnnotation)
      Obtain Validate Group classes
      参数:
      javaAnnotation - the annotation of controller method param
      返回:
      the group annotation value

    • getClassTagsValue

      public static String getClassTagsValue(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, String tagName, boolean checkComments)
      Retrieves the Javadoc tag values for a specified tag name in a given Java class.
      参数:
      cls - The Java class to inspect.
      tagName - The name of the tag to search for.
      checkComments - Indicates whether to validate the presence of comments for empty tag values.
      返回:
      A comma-separated string of all values found for the specified tag, or an empty string if the tag name is empty.
      抛出:
      RuntimeException - If the tag is used without comments and checkComments is true.

    • getFinalFieldValue

      public static Map<String,String> getFinalFieldValue(Class<?> clazz) throws IllegalAccessException
      Get Map of final field and value
      参数:
      clazz - Java class
      返回:
      Map
      抛出:
      IllegalAccessException - IllegalAccessException

    • genericParamMap

      public static void genericParamMap(Map<String,String> genericMap, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, String[] globGicName)
      Generic parameter map.
      参数:
      genericMap - generic map
      cls - Java class
      globGicName - generic name array

    • javaTypeFormat

      public static String javaTypeFormat(String returnType)
      Formats a Java type string. This method processes and formats the return type string, removing generic uncertainty indicators and spaces.
      参数:
      returnType - The original return type string, which may contain generic uncertainty indicators.
      返回:
      The formatted return type string, with '?', ' ', and 'extends' characters removed.

    • isTargetChildClass

      public static boolean isTargetChildClass(String sourceClass, String targetClass)
      Determines if one class is a child of another class.

      This method checks whether the class represented by `sourceClass` is a subclass of the class represented by `targetClass`. It returns true if `sourceClass` is a subclass or identical to `targetClass`, and false otherwise. If either `sourceClass` or `targetClass` cannot be found, it returns false and logs a warning message.

      参数:
      sourceClass - The name of the class to check.
      targetClass - The name of the target class to determine if `sourceClass` is a subclass of.
      返回:
      true if `sourceClass` is a subclass or identical to `targetClass`; false otherwise.

    • getClassJsonIgnoreFields

      public static Map<String,String> getClassJsonIgnoreFields(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls)
      Retrieves all fields marked for JSON serialization ignoring from a given class. This method inspects the annotations of the class to find field names that are marked as ignored for JSON serialization.
      参数:
      cls - The JavaClass object representing the class to inspect its annotations.
      返回:
      A map containing field names and their ignore properties. Returns an empty map if not found or if input is null.

    • getJsonIgnoresProp

      public static Map<String,String> getJsonIgnoresProp(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation annotation, String propName)
      Retrieves specified ignored properties from a Java annotation in JSON format. This method parses a specific parameter from an annotation and converts it into a map format for further processing. It handles three scenarios: the parameter does not exist, is a single value, or is multiple values.
      参数:
      annotation - The input Java annotation.
      propName - The name of the parameter in the annotation that indicates which properties should be ignored.
      返回:
      A Map where keys are property names to be ignored and values are null.

    • getGenericsNameByActualTypesMap

      public static String getGenericsNameByActualTypesMap(String originalName, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
      Replaces generic type parameters in a given type name with their corresponding actual types, based on the provided mapping.
      参数:
      originalName - the original type name containing generic type parameters
      actualTypesMap - a mapping of generic type parameter names to their corresponding actual types
      返回:
      the type name with generic type parameters replaced by their actual types

    • getParamJsonViewClasses

      public static Set<String> getParamJsonViewClasses(Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation> annotations, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder)
      Extracts `@JsonView` value classes from a collection of annotations.
      参数:
      annotations - the collection of Java annotations to process
      builder - the project documentation configuration builder, used to access configuration details
      返回:
      a set containing all the JSON view classes extracted from the annotations. If the input annotation collection is empty, an empty set is returned.

    • getJsonViewClasses

      public static Set<String> getJsonViewClasses(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation javaAnnotation, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, boolean isParam)
      Retrieves a set of fully qualified class names associated with the JsonView.
      参数:
      javaAnnotation - The Java annotation containing the JsonView information, which
      builder - The project configuration builder used to retrieve class information by name.
      isParam - if isParam,just return the type;if isParam is false, return the super class and interface
      返回:
      A set of fully qualified class names related to the JsonView.

    • shouldExcludeFieldFromJsonView

      public static boolean shouldExcludeFieldFromJsonView(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation annotation, Set<String> methodJsonViewClasses, boolean isResp, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
      Determines whether a field should be excluded from the JSON output based on the @JsonView annotation present on the method.

      This method uses the shouldIncludeFieldInJsonView method to determine if the field should be included and negates the result to determine if it should be excluded.

      参数:
      annotation - the annotation present on the field, typically @JsonView.
      methodJsonViewClasses - the set of JsonView classes specified on the method.
      isResp - a boolean indicating whether the current context is a response.
      projectBuilder - the project configuration builder.
      返回:
      true if the field should be excluded from the JSON output, otherwise false.

    • shouldIncludeFieldInJsonView

      public static boolean shouldIncludeFieldInJsonView(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation annotation, Set<String> methodJsonViewClasses, boolean isResponse, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
      Determines if a field should be included in the JSON response based on the presence of @JsonView annotations on the method and field. This method checks if the field's annotation matches any of the method's JsonView classes when the context is a response.
      参数:
      annotation - The annotation on the field being checked.
      methodJsonViewClasses - The set of JsonView classes associated with the method.
      isResponse - Whether the current context is for a response (true) or a request (false).
      projectBuilder - The project configuration builder used to resolve classes.
      返回:
      true if the field should be included in the JSON view; false otherwise.

    • getSuperJavaClassAndInterface

      public static Set<String> getSuperJavaClassAndInterface(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass clazz)
      Recursively retrieves the fully qualified names of superclasses and interfaces of a given Java class.
      参数:
      clazz - The Java class to process.
      返回:
      A set of fully qualified names of superclasses and interfaces.

    • getAnnotationValueClassNames

      public static List<String> getAnnotationValueClassNames(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation javaAnnotation, String propertyName)
      Retrieves a list of fully qualified class names from a specified annotation property.

      This method extracts the fully qualified names of classes referenced by a specific property within a Java annotation. It handles both single class references and lists of class references. If the property is not found or has no valid class references, an empty list is returned.

      参数:
      javaAnnotation - the annotation containing the property
      propertyName - the name of the property to retrieve
      返回:
      a list of fully qualified class names or an empty list if not present

    • getAnnotationValueStrings

      public static List<String> getAnnotationValueStrings(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation javaAnnotation, String propertyName)
      Retrieves a list of string values from a specified annotation property.

      This method extracts string values referenced by a specific property within a Java annotation. It handles both single string values and lists of string values. If the property is not found or has no valid string values, an empty list is returned.

      参数:
      projectBuilder - the project configuration builder
      javaAnnotation - the annotation containing the property
      propertyName - the name of the property to retrieve
      返回:
      a list of string values or an empty list if not present

    • getAnnotationValues

      public static List<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.expression.AnnotationValue> getAnnotationValues(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation javaAnnotation, String propertyName)
      Retrieves a list of AnnotationValue objects from a specified annotation property.

      This method extracts the AnnotationValue objects referenced by a specific property within a Java annotation. It handles both single value references and lists of value references.

      参数:
      javaAnnotation - the annotation containing the property
      propertyName - the name of the property to retrieve
      返回:
      a list of AnnotationValue objects if present, otherwise an empty list

    • getEnumInfoAndValue

      public static EnumInfoAndValues getEnumInfoAndValue(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, boolean jsonEnum)
      Retrieves enum information and values for a given Java class.

      This method first gathers general information about the enum, then collects all enum values and their descriptions. If the enum is used in a form, it only collects names and sets the type as string.

      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class object representing the enum.
      builder - The project documentation configuration builder, used to access project-specific documentation settings.
      jsonEnum - Whether it is an enum in JSON
      返回:
      An EnumInfoAndValues object containing both the enum information and its values.
